failure_reason: Moved native mutation preview trust from an unstructured remaining-gap string into a Form-native trust envelope. native-mutation-trust-envelope.fk returns 11111 across sibling kernels for prediction residual, side-effect intents, choice_success=1 with silence/protocol/fail/stop/BMA markers, and reversible gate state. production-routes.fk embeds the same envelope in preview responses; the A/B harness observed 5/5 passing cases with all envelope checks true, confidence 1.0, and ordinary traffic unflipped. The next native boundary is side-effect execution and a narrow reversible public gate with rollback receipt.
